suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature metadata references only installed skills (or ship required mission-specific skills like `bugfix-worker` before scheduling workers).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both critical-logic feature workers recorded `Error: Skill "bugfix-worker" not found` in transcripts/handoffs, forcing procedural deviations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align feature-level `verificationSteps` with mission-level CI policy by always including lint when mission AGENTS mandates lint.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS mandates lint in CI gates, but critical-logic implementation feature verification steps/handoffs omitted lint.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repository-level `.factory/services.yaml` is absent while mission guidance references it.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous - no repository-local schema or baseline manifest was provided, so creating one here could introduce incorrect shared-state conventions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repository-level `.factory/library/` is absent while mission guidance references it.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous - no baseline library structure was present, so adding ad-hoc artifacts in this pass risks polluting shared knowledge format.
